name: strict-lean
hypothesis: Reduce strict's verbosity and challenge count while keeping coverage matrix, zero-tolerance eval, and reproduction commands. Target: same DoD quality at ~60% token cost.

changes.planner: Removed question-asking and sprint-splitting. Kept requirement extraction and coverage matrix. Capped at 5 features / 4 DoD per feature.
changes.generator: Condensed to 4 rules. Kept feature-by-feature workflow and eval feedback protocol.
changes.adversary: Reduced from 15→8 challenges, 20→12 min budget. Kept reproduction commands and demands-for-evidence.
changes.evaluator: Condensed prose. Kept zero-tolerance policy and progress delta tracking.
changes.skill: Reduced max rounds 4→3, tightened timeouts, removed sprint support.
